name: Top Customers by Deposit Concentration

metadata.exclusions: Includes active and restricted accounts; excludes frozen accounts.
metadata.assumptions: Uses current_balance as concentration basis and ranks by largest balances at query time.
metadata.methodology: Calculates each customer's share of included balances using SUM(current_balance) over the ranked population.
caveat_templates: Concentration risk is measured as current balance share and does not include withdrawal velocity stress.
Top-N concentration output omits the long tail outside the ranked customers.
metadata.confidence_notes: Concentration percentages validated against current_balance snapshots in seeded account data.

sql_template:
SELECT
    bc.customer_code,
    bc.segment,
    ROUND(SUM(ba.current_balance)::numeric, 2) AS total_balance,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(ba.current_balance) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(ba.current_balance)) OVER (), 0),
        2
    ) AS balance_share_pct
FROM public.bank_accounts ba
JOIN public.bank_customers bc ON ba.customer_id = bc.customer_id
WHERE ba.status IN ('active', 'restricted')
GROUP BY bc.customer_code, bc.segment
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT {top_n};

top_n.description: Number of customers returned in concentration ranking.

description: Ranks customers by balance share to highlight deposit concentration risk.
